title: Senior Financial Analyst - MobiKwik Consulting Pvt Ltd - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - MobiKwik Consulting Pvt Ltd - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
MobiKwik Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Raipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About MobiKwik Consulting Pvt Ltd:
MobiKwik Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MobiKwik Consulting Pvt Ltd!
